name: Forefront Tech Holdings Acquisition Corp
business: Forefront Tech Holdings Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus on target businesses in the technology sector with an emphasis on blockchain-enabled artificial intelligence, digital trade identities and robotics. It expects to focus on platforms serving the Southeast Asia nations (ASEAN) and the region's cross-border corridors.

exposures.sentence: We intend to leverage our management team s experience, relationships and capital markets expertise to identify and complete an initial business combination with a technology -driven company that is supported by blockchain open -source IT and operates in one or more of the areas of: 1. Artificial Intelligence ( AI ), 2. Verifiable Digital Identities & Commercial and Trade Credentials, and 3. Applied Robotics.

The region s large, youthful population, internet/smartphone penetration and rising cloud & data infrastructure create favorable conditions for rapid adoption of AI and automation -based services.

catalysts.event: Complete initial business combination within 18 months from closing of offering
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 18 months from the closing of this offering (as may be extended by shareholder approval to amend our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association to extend the date by which we must consummate our initial business combination) or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.

tamClaims.claim: AI could boost ASEAN's GDP by 10% to 18% adding up to USD 1 trillion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: AI is now a primary engine of economic growth, with projections indicating it could boost ASEAN s GDP by 10% to 18% adding up to USD 1 trillion by 2030.
